entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for its response to mid-season drought

entities.name: SORGHUM BICOLOR L. MOENCH
entities.description: The scientific name of the sorghum species

entities.name: DESICCATION TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand drying out

entities.name: GRAIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to produce grain after release from drought

entities.name: LEAF PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to produce new leaves after release from drought

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The timing of plant development, categorized as early- or late-maturing

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The site in Central India where the study was conducted

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: The region where the study was conducted

entities.name: VISUAL ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of visually selecting resistant and susceptible lines

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: A control treatment where water was provided throughout the growth period

entities.name: MID-SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: A stress treatment where water was withheld from 20 to 84 days sowing

entities.name: SHOOT GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate of growth of the shoot system

entities.name: ROOT GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate of growth of the root system

entities.name: SOIL WATER-EXTRACTION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which the plant extracts water from the soil

entities.name: ROOT:SHOOT RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of root biomass to shoot biomass

entities.name: LEAF WATER-POTENTIAL
entities.description: The measure of the energy state of water in the leaves

entities.name: DRY-MATTER PRODUCTION PER UNIT WATER
entities.description: The amount of dry matter produced per unit of water transpired

entities.name: LEAF DEATH
entities.description: The occurrence of leaf senescence or death due to drought stress

entities.name: PANICLE INITIATION
entities.description: The start of the reproductive phase in sorghum

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE PERIOD LENGTH
entities.description: The duration from panicle initiation to maturity

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced

entities.name: GRAIN-SET
entities.description: The process of grain formation and filling

entities.name: TILLERING
entities.description: The production of side shoots or tillers
